steps.title: Identify what explicitly changed
steps.content: The passage states: "he ceased to write plays and assumed instead the nobler rôle of patron to unrecognized authors and artists and to ruined managers." The explicit change is that he stopped writing plays.

steps.title: Apply this to the answer choices
steps.content: The matching choice directly captures this: he stopped writing plays. The other three choices either describe events the passage doesn't discuss or contradict his actual transformation. D is correct.
